message:
✨ Add Card Factory templates for timers, image viewer, and port forwards (#2989)

Add three new Tier 2 code templates to the Card Factory:

- Auto-Refresh Timer: Demonstrates setInterval for periodic data refresh,
  showing that the sandbox provides safe timer wrappers (fixes #2986)
- Image from URL: Display and auto-refresh an image from any URL or API
  endpoint with error handling and cache-busting (addresses #2987)
- Port Forward Tracker: Track and manage kubectl port-forward sessions
  with copy-to-clipboard commands and active/inactive state (addresses #2988)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
